# FIXTURE: LEGO Shop receipt/invoice email (real email, captured 2026-07-05)

# note: body carries NO order number — invoice number + purchase date only (A-007 Tier 2).
# The PDF is the payload; Agent 1A parses it. Email body below is the complete plaintext.

Dear LEGO® Fan,

Thanks for shopping with us! You'll find enclosed a copy of the invoice 1355278758 from your recent purchase 07/01/2026.
Please keep it for your future reference.

Happy building!

Your LEGO® Service team
